summary: Tested 5 bug fixes for P2P Exchange. All backend tests passed (11/11). All frontend UI tests verified successfully.
passed_tests: Bug 1 - Backend: Public offers have requisites with type field - PASSED
Bug 1 - Backend: Offers have unique payment types (no duplicates) - PASSED
Bug 1 - Frontend: Main page shows payment types (Банковская карта, СБП, Сотовая связь, Перевод СНГ) - PASSED
Bug 2 - Backend: Public offers include trader_id for ownership check - PASSED
Bug 2 - Backend: My offers endpoint returns trader's offers - PASSED
Bug 2 - Frontend: Own offers show 'Ваше' label instead of 'Купить' button - PASSED
Bug 3 - Backend: Trader profile does not return shop_balance - PASSED
Bug 3 - Frontend: Profile page shows Баланс USDT, Никнейм, Логин but NOT 'Торговый счёт' - PASSED
Bug 4 - Backend: Transactions endpoint returns data - PASSED
Bug 4 - Backend: Transfers use correct field names (from_id/to_id) - PASSED
Bug 4 - Backend: Transfer history endpoint works - PASSED
Bug 4 - Frontend: Transaction history shows transfers with correct colors (red for outgoing, green for incoming) - PASSED
Bug 5 - Backend: Forum rate limit returns 429 when sending messages too fast - PASSED
Bug 5 - Backend: Forum rate limit allows messages after 5 second wait - PASSED
Bug 5 - Backend: Rate limit error message contains 'Подождите X сек. перед отправкой' - PASSED
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data. Unbanned traders from forum for rate limit testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 bug fixes verified: 1) Payment types show unique types only (Банковская карта, СБП, etc.) not bank names or duplicates. 2) Own offers show 'Ваше' label when logged in as the offer owner. 3) Profile page (Аккаунт → Профиль) does NOT show 'Торговый счёт' - only shows Баланс USDT, Никнейм, Логин. 4) Transaction history shows transfers with correct colors - red (#EF4444) for outgoing/negative, green (#10B981) for incoming/positive. 5) Forum rate limit works - returns 429 with 'Подождите X сек. перед отправкой' when sending messages within 5 seconds.
